description:
You are an 8th-grade media arts teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a lesson on the origins of cinema. Using the 11 raw historical photographs from Eadweard Muybridge's 1878 'The Horse in Motion' experiment located in /home/ga/Documents/muybridge/, create an infinitely looping animated GIF at /home/ga/Documents/horse_motion.gif with a frame delay of 100 milliseconds and a width of 500 pixels (maintaining aspect ratio). Incorporate this GIF into an offline HTML presentation saved at /home/ga/Documents/cinema_history.html. The HTML file must contain an

heading 'The Horse in Motion', an tag linking to the GIF, a paragraph describing the experiment using the keywords 'Muybridge' and '1878', and CSS styling setting the background to '#333333' and text to '#FFFFFF'. Verify the final presentation renders correctly in the browser at file:///home/ga/Documents/cinema_history.html.
